
# v1



NotificationService manages sending and receiving notifications.


---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #0070f3', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### Send <span style={{backgroundColor: '#0070f3', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginLeft: '0.5rem'}}>UNARY</span>

Send delivers a notification to a recipient.

<div style={{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'2rem',alignItems:'start'}}>
<div style={{flex:'1 1 400px',minWidth:0}}>

#### Request: SendRequest

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>recipient</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.Recipient" href="/shared/notifications/v1#recipient" fields={[{"name":"user_id","type":"string"},{"name":"email","type":"string","optional":true},{"name":"phone","type":"string","optional":true}]}/><br/><br/>recipient is who the notification should be delivered to.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>subject</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>subject is the short title of the notification.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>body</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>body is the full notification content.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>scheduled_at</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><span style={{fontSize:'0.75rem',background:'#059669',color:'white',padding:'2px 8px',borderRadius:'4px',marginRight:'0.5rem'}}>optional</span> <TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.Timestamp" href="/shared/notifications/v1#timestamp" fields={[{"name":"seconds","type":"int64"},{"name":"nanos","type":"int32"}]}/><br/><br/>scheduled_at optionally schedules delivery for a future time.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Response: SendResponse

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>notification_id</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>notification_id is the unique identifier assigned to the notification.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>status</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.DeliveryStatus" href="/shared/notifications/v1#deliverystatus" fields={[{"name":"DELIVERY_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED"},{"name":"PENDING"},{"name":"DELIVERED"},{"name":"FAILED"},{"name":"READ"}]}/><br/><br/>status is the initial delivery status.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>queued_at</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.Timestamp" href="/shared/notifications/v1#timestamp" fields={[{"name":"seconds","type":"int64"},{"name":"nanos","type":"int32"}]}/><br/><br/>queued_at is the time the notification was accepted.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Errors


##### `INVALID_ARGUMENT`

one or more fields failed validation.

Detail type: <TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.ValidationFailure" href="/shared/notifications/v1#validationfailure" fields={[{"name":"field","type":"string"},{"name":"reason","type":"string"}]}/>


```json
{
  "field": "recipient.email | subject | body",
  "reason": "human-readable constraint violation"
}
```



---


##### `RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED`

the caller has exceeded its notification quota.

Detail type: `google.rpc.QuotaFailure`


```json
{
  "violations": [
    {
      "description": "daily send limit reached.",
      "subject": "notifications/day"
    },
    {
      "description": "rate limit exceeded; back off and retry.",
      "subject": "notifications/second"
    }
  ]
}
```



---


##### `NOT_FOUND`

the target resource could not be located.

Detail type: `google.rpc.ResourceInfo`


```json
{
  "resource_name": "recipient.user_id",
  "resource_type": "Recipient"
}
```



---


##### `NOT_FOUND`

the recipient user does not exist.



---


##### `FAILED_PRECONDITION`

the account is not in a state that allows sending.

Detail type: `google.rpc.PreconditionFailure`


```json
{
  "violations": [
    {
      "description": "the sending account has been suspended.",
      "type": "ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED"
    },
    {
      "description": "the sender email has not been verified.",
      "type": "EMAIL_UNVERIFIED"
    }
  ]
}
```



---


##### `UNAUTHENTICATED`

the request could not be authenticated.

Detail type: `google.rpc.ErrorInfo`


```json
{
  "domain": "notifier.example.com",
  "reason": "INVALID_TOKEN"
}
```



---


##### `UNAVAILABLE`

the service is temporarily unavailable; retry after the indicated delay.

Detail type: `google.rpc.RetryInfo`


```json
{
  "retry_delay": "5s"
}
```




</div>
</div>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #7928ca', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### Subscribe <span style={{backgroundColor: '#7928ca', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginLeft: '0.5rem'}}>SERVER STREAM</span>

Subscribe opens a live stream of incoming notifications for a user.

<div style={{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'2rem',alignItems:'start'}}>
<div style={{flex:'1 1 400px',minWidth:0}}>

#### Request: SubscribeRequest

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>user_id</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>user_id identifies the user whose notifications to stream.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Response: Notification

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>notification_id</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>notification_id is the unique identifier of the notification.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>subject</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>subject is the short title of the notification.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>body</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>body is the full notification content.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>status</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.DeliveryStatus" href="/shared/notifications/v1#deliverystatus" fields={[{"name":"DELIVERY_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED"},{"name":"PENDING"},{"name":"DELIVERED"},{"name":"FAILED"},{"name":"READ"}]}/><br/><br/>status is the current delivery status.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>sent_at</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.Timestamp" href="/shared/notifications/v1#timestamp" fields={[{"name":"seconds","type":"int64"},{"name":"nanos","type":"int32"}]}/><br/><br/>sent_at is when the notification was originally sent.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Errors


##### `NOT_FOUND`

the user does not exist.



---


##### `UNAUTHENTICATED`

the request could not be authenticated.

Detail type: `google.rpc.ErrorInfo`


```json
{
  "domain": "notifier.example.com",
  "reason": "INVALID_TOKEN"
}
```



---


##### `UNAVAILABLE`

the service is temporarily unavailable; retry after the indicated delay.

Detail type: `google.rpc.RetryInfo`


```json
{
  "retry_delay": "5s"
}
```




</div>
</div>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #f5a623', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### Acknowledge <span style={{backgroundColor: '#f5a623', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginLeft: '0.5rem'}}>CLIENT STREAM</span>

Acknowledge bulk-acknowledges a stream of notification IDs.

<div style={{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'2rem',alignItems:'start'}}>
<div style={{flex:'1 1 400px',minWidth:0}}>

#### Request: AcknowledgeRequest

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>notification_id</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>notification_id is the ID of the notification to acknowledge.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Response: AcknowledgeResponse

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>acknowledged_count</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>int32</code><br/><br/>acknowledged_count is how many notifications were successfully acknowledged.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>failed_ids</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string[]</code><br/><br/>failed_ids contains IDs that could not be acknowledged.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Errors


##### `NOT_FOUND`

one or more notification IDs do not exist.



---


##### `UNAUTHENTICATED`

the request could not be authenticated.

Detail type: `google.rpc.ErrorInfo`


```json
{
  "domain": "notifier.example.com",
  "reason": "INVALID_TOKEN"
}
```




</div>
</div>

</div>

---

<div style={{borderLeft: '3px solid #e00', paddingLeft: '1.5rem', marginTop: '2rem', marginBottom: '2rem'}}>

### Chat <span style={{backgroundColor: '#e00', color: 'white', padding: '2px 10px', borderRadius: '4px', fontSize: '0.7rem', fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: 'monospace', verticalAlign: 'middle', marginLeft: '0.5rem'}}>BIDI STREAM</span>

Chat opens a bidirectional stream for real-time messaging.

<div style={{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'2rem',alignItems:'start'}}>
<div style={{flex:'1 1 400px',minWidth:0}}>

#### Request: ChatMessage

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>sender_id</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>sender_id is the user ID of the message author.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>text</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>text is the content of the message.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>sent_at</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.Timestamp" href="/shared/notifications/v1#timestamp" fields={[{"name":"seconds","type":"int64"},{"name":"nanos","type":"int32"}]}/><br/><br/>sent_at is when the message was sent.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Response: ChatMessage

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>sender_id</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>sender_id is the user ID of the message author.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>text</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>text is the content of the message.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>sent_at</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><TypePreview name="shared.notifications.v1.Timestamp" href="/shared/notifications/v1#timestamp" fields={[{"name":"seconds","type":"int64"},{"name":"nanos","type":"int32"}]}/><br/><br/>sent_at is when the message was sent.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


#### Errors


##### `NOT_FOUND`

the target user for the chat session does not exist.



---


##### `UNAUTHENTICATED`

the request could not be authenticated.

Detail type: `google.rpc.ErrorInfo`


```json
{
  "domain": "notifier.example.com",
  "reason": "INVALID_TOKEN"
}
```



---


##### `RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED`

the caller has exceeded its concurrent stream limit.

Detail type: `google.rpc.QuotaFailure`


```json
{
  "violations": [
    {
      "description": "maximum concurrent chat streams reached.",
      "subject": "chat/concurrent_streams"
    }
  ]
}
```




</div>
</div>

</div>
